messages.content: You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"submit_meter_reading","description":"Submit a utility meter reading.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"meter_id":{"type":"string"},"reading_kwh":{"type":"number"},"read_at":{"type":"string"}},"required":["meter_id","reading_kwh","read_at"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"flag_meter_variance","description":"Flag a meter variance.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"meter_id":{"type":"string"},"variance_percent":{"type":"number"}},"required":["meter_id","variance_percent"]}}}]</tools>
Submit meter MTR-309 reading 4812.7 kWh at 2026-06-01T07:00:00+10:00 and flag a 12.5 percent variance.

<tool_call>
{"name":"submit_meter_reading","arguments":{"meter_id":"MTR-309","reading_kwh":4812.7,"read_at":"2026-06-01T07:00:00+10:00"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"flag_meter_variance","arguments":{"meter_id":"MTR-309","variance_percent":12.5}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"enroll_student","description":"Enroll a student.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"student_id":{"type":"string"},"course_code":{"type":"string"},"term":{"type":"string"}},"required":["student_id","course_code","term"]}}},{"type":"function","function":{"name":"send_enrollment_notice","description":"Send enrollment notice.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"student_id":{"type":"string"},"recipient":{"type":"string"}},"required":["student_id","recipient"]}}}]</tools>
Enroll student STU-118 in BIO210 for term 2026-S2 and send the notice to advisor@example.test.

<tool_call>
{"name":"enroll_student","arguments":{"student_id":"STU-118","course_code":"BIO210","term":"2026-S2"}}
</tool_call>
<tool_call>
{"name":"send_enrollment_notice","arguments":{"student_id":"STU-118","recipient":"advisor@example.test"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"update_shipping_address","description":"Update shipping address.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"order_id":{"type":"string"},"address":{"type":"string"},"city":{"type":"string"},"postal_code":{"type":"string"},"country":{"type":"string"}},"required":["order_id","address","city","postal_code","country"]}}}]</tools>
Update order ORD-731 shipping to 14 Cedar Lane, Newcastle, 2300, Australia.

<tool_call>
{"name":"update_shipping_address","arguments":{"order_id":"ORD-731","address":"14 Cedar Lane"}}
</tool_call>
That omitted city, postal code, and country. Re-issue only the corrected tool call.

<tool_call>
{"name":"update_shipping_address","arguments":{"order_id":"ORD-731","address":"14 Cedar Lane","city":"Newcastle","postal_code":"2300","country":"Australia"}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"create_webhook_subscription","description":"Create webhook subscription.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"endpoint":{"type":"string"},"events":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}},"secret_name":{"type":"string"},"active":{"type":"boolean"}},"required":["endpoint","events","secret_name","active"]}}}]</tools>
Create an active webhook for https://hooks.example.test/payments for payment.created and payment.failed using secret payments_v2.

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_webhook_subscription","arguments":{"endpoint":"https://hooks.example.test/payments","events":["payment.created"]}}
</tool_call>
You left out payment.failed, secret_name, and active. Return only the fixed call.

<tool_call>
{"name":"create_webhook_subscription","arguments":{"endpoint":"https://hooks.example.test/payments","events":["payment.created","payment.failed"],"secret_name":"payments_v2","active":true}}
</tool_call>

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"set_fuel_card_limits","description":"Set fuel card limits.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"card_id":{"type":"string"},"daily_limit_cents":{"type":"integer"},"monthly_limit_cents":{"type":"integer"},"allowed_fuel_types":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"string"}}},"required":["card_id","daily_limit_cents","monthly_limit_cents","allowed_fuel_types"]}}}]</tools>
Set fuel card FC-29 to daily limit 12000 cents, monthly limit 220000 cents, allowed for diesel and unleaded.

<tool_call>
{"name":"set_fuel_card_limits","arguments":{"card_id":"FC-29","daily_limit_cents":12000}}
</tool_call>
Correct it with both limits and both fuel types. Only the corrected tool call.

<tool_call>
{"name":"set_fuel_card_limits","arguments":{"card_id":"FC-29","daily_limit_cents":12000,"monthly_limit_cents":220000,"allowed_fuel_types":["diesel","unleaded"]}}
</tool_call>
